FLOW.COMMENT: insertActive - insert a new record into the TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE and TFW_TRANS_STEPS tables

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_replaceContent - replace the latest content as a continuation from a remote IS ) (distributed or central

INVOKE.COMMENT: Content uncompressed from 8277 bytes to 29341 bytes under the name content2 - check for last space => posSpace
